title: Walled City Structure
description: Spice up your badlands biomes with the new walled city structure! inspired by the Kowloon Walled City
body:
This data pack adds the new walled city structure, inspired by the real life Kowloon Walled City. The structure spawns in all badlands biomes and is filled with loot and enemies to fight. The treasury in the middle contains the best loot but also spawns the toughest illagers. They inhabit every corner of the city, making it a dangerous place to explore early game. The chests scattered within the buildings contain useful materials such as coal, iron, gold and diamonds, aswell as repeaters, comparators, armor trims, name tags, golden apples and enchanted books. The treasury contains lots of useful late game items such as totems of undying, diamonds and gold.

Please note that the buildings and loot tables are subject to change. If you encounter any issues or have any complaints or suggestions feel free to post a comment on the page. Visit the gallery for images of the naturally generated structure.
